---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new component or feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Component

Is this about an existing component or a new one?

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or component you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this would solve or the workflow it would improve.

## Proposed API

```tsx
// Example of how the component/feature would be used
<ComponentName
  prop1="value"
  prop2={true}
  onEvent={(data) => console.log(data)}
/>
```

## Design Considerations

- **Accessibility**: How should this be navigated with keyboard/screen reader?
- **Theming**: Any special theme considerations?
- **Responsive**: Any specific mobile/tablet behavior?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or any other context.
